      "text": "N tas KUNGS run-
naja us Mohsu eekſch
thas Tuksnefes Sinâi

"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Laid nu tee Israëta Behr-

"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Zettortâpadesmitâ Deenâ/

"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad runnaja Mohsus us

"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee turreja tohs Paffa-

"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un zitti bija bijufchi / kas

reht / tadeht peegahje tee pee

tchâ Deenâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee paschi fazzija us to:

ta KUNGA Uppuri fawa no-
fazzitâ Laikâ / ne warretam up-
